expectations.text: SKILL.md exists and is non-empty (≥ 500 bytes)
SKILL.md frontmatter does NOT contain `disable-model-invocation: true`
SKILL.md frontmatter description names the dbname `evaldb` and at least one seeded table
expectations.evidence: dbname present: True; one of expected tables in skill_text: see size 4352

expectations.text: README.md exists and is non-empty (≥ 500 bytes)
references/tables.md contains a section heading for every seeded table (public.users, public.products, public.orders, public.order_items, analytics.events)
references/relationships.md contains arrow lines for every seeded FK
references/views.md exists and contains a section for `public.active_users` with the view's SQL definition
expectations.evidence: file exists: True; active_users in text: True; def recognizable: True

expectations.text: references/enums.md exists and lists all four `order_status` labels
references/indexes.md exists and includes the user-defined indexes (schema-qualified)
scripts/query.sh has no unsubstituted `<host>`, `<port>`, `<user>`, or `<dbname>` placeholders
running `bash query.sh "SELECT count(*) FROM users"` against the live fixture returns `3`
